Aker ASA ( (AKAAF) ) has shared an update.

Aker ASA has scheduled the publication of its first-quarter 2026 financial results for Friday, May 8, 2026, at 07:00 CEST, underscoring its regular financial reporting cadence to the market. The company will host an English-language online webcast presentation at 09:00 CEST the same day, enabling investors and analysts to review the figures and submit questions in real time.

The webcast will include an interactive Q&A session, with participants able to submit questions during the event via the online platform or in advance. Presentation materials will be made available on the company’s website and through the Norwegian news portal, supporting transparency and facilitating informed decision-making among shareholders and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AKAAF) stock is a Sell with a NOK565.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aker ASA stock, see the AKAAF Stock Forecast page.

More about Aker ASA

Aker ASA is a Norwegian industrial investment company with holdings across energy, marine, and industrial sectors, focusing on long-term value creation through active ownership. The group typically manages a portfolio of listed and private companies, with a strong presence in maritime, oil and gas, and renewable-related activities.

data.title: BP Reports Total Voting Rights and Share Capital as of 30 April 2026
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from BP ( (BP) ) is now available.

As at 30 April 2026, BP reported an issued share capital of 15,702,101,757 ordinary shares, each carrying one vote, and 12,706,252 preference shares, which carry two votes for every £5 of nominal capital. The company also held 784,211,237 ordinary shares in treasury, which are excluded from dividend payments and from voting at shareholder meetings.

Taking these holdings into account, BP confirmed a total of 15,707,184,257 voting rights in the company as of that date, a key figure used by investors to assess when they must disclose shareholdings under the U.K. Financial Conduct Authority’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. The filing, dated 1 May 2026, underscores BP’s compliance with regulatory reporting requirements and provides clarity for stakeholders tracking ownership thresholds and governance dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (BP) stock is a Hold with a $44.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BP stock, see the BP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BP is a Neutral.

The score is driven by mixed financial fundamentals: solid operating cash flow and free cash flow are offset by very thin net profitability and increased leverage. Technicals are supportive with an uptrend across major moving averages and positive momentum indicators. Valuation is a key drag due to the extremely high P/E despite a ~4.2% dividend yield. Earnings-call takeaways are modestly positive on execution and balance-sheet priorities, tempered by impairments, buyback suspension, and divestment timing risk.

To see Spark’s full report on BP stock, click here.

More about BP

BP p.l.c. is a global integrated energy company headquartered in London, operating primarily in the oil, gas and low-carbon energy sectors. The group is listed in the U.K. and U.S. markets and its ordinary and preference shares are widely held by institutional and retail investors who are subject to U.K. market disclosure and transparency rules.

Average Trading Volume: 14,474,381

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $122.8B

For an in-depth examination of BP stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

The update ensures market participants have an accurate denominator for calculating their notifiable interests, which is essential for maintaining transparent reporting of significant shareholdings. By publicly restating its total voting rights, Quilter supports orderly market conduct and helps investors track potential changes in its shareholder structure within the UK’s disclosure regime.

data.title: R8 Capital Shares Suspended as Shell Group Lines Up Convertible Loan Funding
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mode Global Holdings Plc ( (GB:MODE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

R8 Capital Investments Plc has had trading in its ordinary shares temporarily suspended from the FCA’s Official List and the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, after missing the deadline to publish its FY25 results. The company expects to release those results by the end of June and will then seek to have the suspension lifted, limiting share liquidity in the meantime and adding timing pressure to its reporting obligations.

Alongside the suspension, R8 Capital has entered into non-binding, conditional heads of terms for a proposed fundraising of at least £500,000 via convertible loan notes. Completion of the subscription, targeted on or before 11 May 2026 and subject to KYC and AML checks, would provide fresh capital to support the shell company’s future transactions and may influence its strategic options once trading in the shares resumes.

More about Mode Global Holdings Plc

R8 Capital Investments Plc is a shell company listed in the Equity Shares (Shell Companies) category on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange. As an investment vehicle, it focuses on capital-raising and corporate transactions rather than operating a traditional trading business, using its listing to facilitate future deals and investments.

Average Trading Volume: 297,401

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £1.07M

See more insights into MODE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
